dct_creator_sm: American Geographical Society of New York
dct_description_sm: This is a digital index map to serve as a finding aid for Map of Hispanic America 1:1,000,000. Also known as the Millionth Map of Hispanic America. Published by the American Geographical Society of New York.
schema_provider_s: American Geographical Society Library – UWM Libraries
